description: Service sector is large but focused on professional/specialised services. Routine daily tasks largely self-managed. Service workers provide specialised value rather than convenience outsourcing.
source_note: Stylised from World Bank WDI service sector employment data 2022. High-income OECD economies where services are expensive relative to wages. No specific country named.

description: Mixed service economy. Growing consumer services sector alongside traditional self-reliance norms.
source_note: Stylised from World Bank WDI middle-income economies.

description: Very high service sector employment as a share of total employment. Consumer services (food delivery, domestic help, errand services) are pervasive and inexpensive relative to wages. This creates the supply-side conditions for the delegation economy.
source_note: Stylised from World Bank WDI high-growth economies with large informal service sectors and high gig economy participation.
